commands: bash -c 'set -e; echo "=== FIXING NGINX CONFIG ==="; python3 -c "import sys; c=open(\"/etc/nginx/sites-available/surf-ai\").read(); open(\"/etc/nginx/sites-available/surf-ai\",\"w\").write(c.replace(\"$$\",\"$\"))"; nginx -t && systemctl restart nginx && echo NGINX_OK || echo NGINX_FAIL; echo "=== STARTING DOCKER-COMPOSE ==="; cd /home/ubuntu/surf-ai-system/infra && docker-compose up -d && echo COMPOSE_OK || docker-compose up -d 2>&1; echo "=== docker ps ==="; sleep 5; docker ps; echo "=== curl localhost:8000/health ==="; curl -s --max-time 5 http://localhost:8000/health || echo FAIL; echo "=== curl localhost/api/health ==="; curl -s --max-time 5 http://localhost/api/health || echo FAIL; echo "=== curl surfing.heyi.co.il/api/health ==="; curl -s --max-time 10 http://surfing.heyi.co.il/api/health || echo FAIL'
